extraction.one_line_summary: BAUMANN won from breakaway with 12min gap; GC group finished together with LANDA briefly gapping CARAPAZ/HINDLEY before final corner crash.
tactical_patterns: Bora-hansgrohe chased 12min break mid-race then completely retreated before final climb, revealing nervous conservatism over testing rivals.
SIVAKOV pulled final climb despite teammate CARAPAZ in pink, suggesting Ineos prioritized defending over attacking with 3sec margin.
LANDA gained only small gap inside 3km on summit finish despite being 1:05 down, exposing limited separation ability.

rider_signals.PORT Richie: negative: abandoned with suspected gastroenteritis when climbing started 62km out, showed inability to fight through illness.
rider_signals.BAUMANN Kun: positive: won second stage plus secured KOM mathematically with stage remaining, demonstrated breakthrough Grand Tour climbing capability.
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: briefly gapped top two GC rivals inside 3km but unable to sustain, confirming marginal differential at 1:05 deficit.
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: neutral: led final climb for CARAPAZ despite pink jersey suggesting team unwilling to test HINDLEY/LANDA with meaningful acceleration.
